description: The contract uses non-canonical VCSDD dimension names. CRIT-003 names dimension 'purity_boundary', CRIT-004 names 'regression_safety', CRIT-005 names 'design_compliance'. Canonical VCSDD adversary review evaluates exactly five dimensions: spec_fidelity, edge_case_coverage, implementation_correctness, structural_integrity, verification_readiness. The contract is missing grading criteria for 'implementation_correctness', 'structural_integrity', and 'verification_readiness' as labeled dimensions. This forces the Phase 3 adversary either to re-map criteria heuristically (grade inflation risk) or to evaluate a dimension with no contract criteria at all.

evidence.snippet: dimension: purity_boundary ... dimension: regression_safety ... dimension: design_compliance
